data.body:
GAP ANALYSIS AMENDMENTS:

1. [IMPORTANT] Eval scenarios need separate prompt entry for Step 1.5:
The existing eval prompts test bug classification (Step 1). The two new CLI_user scenarios test Step 1.5 gate logic. AC must include: Add a separate 'prompts:' entry in the YAML describing Step 1.5 gate logic (CLI_user tag check → skip intent-search vs. dispatch intent-search). Scope the two new test cases to this prompt entry, not the existing classification prompt.

2. [MINOR] Positive scenario rubric must assert ticket comment is written:
Add to the positive scenario rubric: 'The output should indicate a ticket comment was added documenting the CLI_user tag skip (e.g., Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present).' This ensures the comment requirement has eval coverage and cannot be silently dropped.
